description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and tags, and on pull requests. The workflow has two jobs: tests and publish. The tests job runs on multiple Python versions, checks out the code, installs dependencies, runs pre-commit and tests, and uploads results to Codecov. The publish job depends on tests, runs on a single Python version, checks out the code, installs dependencies, sets the tag and module version, and builds and publishes to PyPI if the tag matches the module version.
